heading_content_part: privacy policyThis Privacy Policy applies to the'ChatADULT'android app.We are committed to protecting your privacy and using any personal information you provide responsibly. We believe it is important for you to understand what information we collect from you, how it is used and who will have access to that information.

information collected- Device ID : This is used to tell users apart, to block users. This isn't related to any personal information.- Messages : It's delivered to partner through the server- Photos : It's delivered to partner through the server- Messages and Photos are removed after being delivered between users- We do not collect or retain any personal information.- We can't track down any users since we don't collect any personal information.
contact informationAll questions and concerns about your privacy can be sent todino@iforu.com.
